---
title: "Lecture notes"

listing:
  id: lecture-notes
  contents:
    - notes.yml
  template: _notes-grid.ejs
  sort: "date desc"
  field-types:
    date: date
  filter-ui: [title, status, language, date]
  page-size: 20
---

A collection of lecture notes and teaching materials.

::: {#lecture-notes}
:::
